Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm using different beans today. I went to a coffee shop and bought some real ones this time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I made sure to store them in the fridge, and I only ground them right before brewing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I also learned you need to be mindful of how hot the water is as well as how you pour it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yes, I practiced with the cheaper beans from before since I can't afford too many of the expensive ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...Although it was hard to drink all that coffee, so I added a lot of milk and sugar.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Well, I practiced with the cheaper beans from before since I can't afford too many of the expensive ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Although, this is the first time I'm brewing with these fancier beans. I wonder how it'll turn out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Oh, sorry! You're right, coffee is best when it's hot and fresh![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Well then, let's drink, shall we? Cheers, {f 4 1}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}But it's not only that. I could actually taste some of the sweetness and richness this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The beans and brewing technique can make a huge difference, huh? Oh, and the smell was great, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Thanks for joining me, {f 4 1}-san. You can go on ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm gonna practice a little more to try and get the hang of this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Let's make some more if we ever get the chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Uh, first I gotta use the bathroom...! I drank a lot while I was practicing today...[n]{f 1 1}
